# UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.automatic

**Case**

The system automatically determines the style depending on whether the cell’s configuration is as a section header.

## Declaration

```swift
case automatic
```

## Constants

- **UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.cell**: The style to use for a selectable cell with nested children.
- **UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.header**: The style to use for a section header.
